title: Salmon and Mexican Stir Fry
description: A delicious and quick-to-make stir fry recipe featuring salmon and Mexican flavors. This dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat a skillet over medium-high heat.
Season the salmon fillets with salt and pepper.
Cook the salmon for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
In a separate pan, heat the stir fry sauce over medium heat.
Add the Mexican chopped onions and stir-fry vegetables to the sauce.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Warm the flour tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the stir fries by placing a cooked salmon fillet onto a tortilla, followed by a spoonful of the sauce and vegetables.
Top with shredded cheese, if using.
Serve immediately and garnish with chopped cilantro.
